name: com.convai.convai-sdk-for-unity
description:
Convai enables AI characters in games and virtual worlds to have human-like conversation capabilities. Add a backstory, knowledge bank, voice, and intelligence to your characters so they converse naturally with players and carry out actions.
Includes the complete conversation pipeline: Speech Recognition, Language Understanding and Generation, Text-to-Speech, Text-to-Action, and Lipsync.

samples.description: A simple sample with core Convai SDK setup and interaction flow using a non-humanoid character.
A sample with a high-quality character and real-time LipSync for immersive conversations.
